summary_en: 92 yen/share FY3/27 (82 yen ordinary + 10 yen commemorative). Interim 45 yen (35 ordinary + 10 commemorative), year-end 47 yen ordinary. Prior year FY3/26: 77 yen/share total.
title_en: Notice of Implementation of 10th Anniversary Listing Commemorative Dividend
translation_en_brief: Iwaki Co. announced a 10th anniversary commemorative dividend on 14 May 2026. The company will distribute 10 yen per share as a special dividend overlaid on its ordinary dividend for fiscal year ending March 2027. Total annual dividend guidance for FY3/27 is set at 92 yen per share, comprising 82 yen ordinary dividend plus 10 yen commemorative dividend. The interim dividend will be 45 yen per share (35 yen ordinary plus 10 yen commemorative), with the year-end dividend at 47 yen per share (ordinary only). This compares to the prior fiscal year (FY3/26) total dividend of 77 yen per share. The company marked its 10th listing anniversary in March 2026, having initially listed on the TSE Mothers market in March 2016, subsequently transitioning to the First Section in 2019 and to the Prime Market in 2022.
